# Paste the full exported localization tune log for the post-patch weak-start validation here.
# Setup: kLocalizationTuneTest = 0. Use the normal safe autonomous start, not the field center, because the normal route is start-relative and can physically hit the center object from a center placement.
# Force fewer than three valid perimeter-wall distance readings at the instant autonomous starts. If covering sensors, cover them close enough to read under the 5 inch minimum; run5 still had a valid 8.1 inch reading and falsely committed before the guard existed.
# Expected after the patch: a two-sensor wall_direct solve must not commit. The log should show relocalize_success=0 with not_enough_commit_sensors, or wall_direct only if three sensors agree.
# The route should still run on odometry from local (0,0,0), with applied corrections suppressed during motion and no unsafe start-pose jump.
